name: Flat-Adaptive Annular Capacity Law
description: Exact annular transport law for the flat-adaptive radial branch. Starting from the promoted operator Delta_f^{rad}u=u''+((beta+1)/r)u' and shell weight w_f(r)=2 pi lambda_0 r_0^{-beta} r^{beta+1}, the Dirichlet annular problem has a closed-form harmonic profile and a constant radial flux. The resulting capacity formula gives a measurable transport observable controlled by the same branch exponent beta that appears in d_eff=beta+2 and in the inverse-square normal form, while recovering the logarithmic 2D annular law exactly at beta=0.
assumptions: Power-law flat branch pi_f(r)=pi lambda_0 (r/r_0)^beta with lambda_0>0 and fixed reference scale r_0.
Radial Dirichlet problem on an annulus a<r<b with a>0 and radial sector only.
Shell weight w_f(r)=2 pi lambda_0 r_0^{-beta} r^{beta+1} is positive and smooth on the domain.
Capacity is defined by the constant radial flux of the minimizing harmonic profile with boundary values u(a)=1 and u(b)=0.
The beta->0 branch is interpreted by the exact logarithmic limit of the same formula.
evidence: Derived exactly from the Euler-Lagrange equation (w_f u')'=0 / Delta_f^{rad}u=0 in data/artifacts/flat_adaptive_annular_capacity/derivation_note.md.
Exact harmonic profile: u_beta(r)=(r^{-beta}-b^{-beta})/(a^{-beta}-b^{-beta}) for beta!=0 and u_0(r)=ln(b/r)/ln(b/a).
Exact transport law: C_f(a,b;beta)=2 pi lambda_0 r_0^{-beta} beta/(a^{-beta}-b^{-beta}) with the exact beta=0 limit 2 pi lambda_0/ln(b/a).

Builds directly on the promoted Power-Law Flat Adaptive Pi Radial Operator, the promoted Effective Dimension of the Power-Law Flat Branch, and the promoted Flat-Adaptive Inverse-Square Normal Form with Kelvin-Mellin Structure.
Effective-dimension rewrite: the same law is the Euclidean annular capacity formula evaluated at d_eff=beta+2, so the effective-dimension identity becomes operational rather than merely formal.
Critical-branch recovery: beta=0 is the exact threshold where the power-law annular profile becomes logarithmic, reproducing the 2D radial law without an extra ansatz.
Verification bundle generated in data/artifacts/flat_adaptive_annular_capacity/annular_capacity_profiles.svg and annular_capacity_table.csv.
